title: Humanoid robot guides
metaDescription: Humanoid robot research: Figure, Apptronik, 1X, Neura, Boston Dynamics — readiness labels and when AMRs are the practical warehouse choice.
intro: Humanoids are tracked separately from our matcher. These guides explain what is pilot-stage vs deployable, and link to warehouse AMRs when you need automation now.

summarySections.heading: What this topic covers
bullets: Research profiles for major humanoid platforms
Humanoid vs AMR for warehouse buyers
When to use the matcher instead of waiting for humanoids

faqs.question: Why are humanoids not in the matcher?
faqs.answer: Most operators cannot procure humanoids like AMRs or scrubbers yet. We track platforms editorially until buyer programs are mature enough to score honestly.
